summary: Live Playwright execution of all 7 PropOS UX cleanup tests on preview URL. 2/7 passed (TEST6 Spitogatos paste, TEST7 Brand). 5/7 failed - most critically TEST2/3/4/5 are blocked by a regression where the cinematic intro 'Opener' screen never transitions to the actual dashboard (InvestOpener.onContinue and OperateOpener.onContinue handlers do not advance introStage to DONE, so InvestDashboard / Operate Hero never mount). TEST1 has a data-testid naming mismatch (code uses 'landing-proof-{id}', spec expects 'landing-proof-card-{id}'). Three proof cards with correct titles ARE rendered.

ui_bugs.issue: CRITICAL: Clicking the 'Open Investor Terminal' button (data-testid='invest-opener-continue-btn') does NOT transition introStage from OPENER -> DONE. The dashboard never mounts. Tested twice with 3-6s waits after click; DOM still shows only invest-opener-* testids and invest-decision-strip/strip-decision/strip-price-position/strip-market-support/strip-risk/strip-next-action/invest-detail-toggles/invest-toggle-* never appear. This blocks TEST2, TEST3, TEST4 entirely.

CRITICAL: Same opener regression - clicking 'Continue Analysis' followed by 'operate-opener-continue-btn' never transitions to the rebuilt hero. operate-section-hero, operate-perf-*, operate-opp-*, operate-action-*, operate-build-plan-cta are all absent (0/11). Page is stuck on operate-opener-* testids.

data-testid naming mismatch. Code emits data-testid='landing-proof-{id}' (e.g. landing-proof-decision, landing-proof-revenue-gap, landing-proof-next-action). Spec / TEST1 expects 'landing-proof-card-{id}'. Three cards with the correct titles ARE rendered; only the testid prefix is off by '-card'.

integration_issues.issue: InvestOpener.onContinue (setIntroStage(INTRO.DONE)) appears not to re-render with the dashboard, OR analysis prop becomes null after stage change. Page remains on opener.
OperateOpener continue handler does not unmount opener and mount the rebuilt hero.

TEST1_homepage_proof_cards.notes: 3 proof cards render correctly with all expected titles ('Buy / Negotiate / Pass', 'Revenue Gap', 'Next Best Action') but testids are 'landing-proof-decision', 'landing-proof-revenue-gap', 'landing-proof-next-action' (no '-card-' segment). Spec selector '[data-testid^=landing-proof-card-]' returns 0.

TEST2_invest_minimal_default.notes: BLOCKED by opener->dashboard transition bug. invest-decision-strip never appears after click. All 5 strip-* cards absent. All 10 accordion section testids absent (would be correct IF dashboard mounted, but here they are absent because dashboard itself never mounted). Toggle strip & 4 toggle buttons absent.

TEST3_toggle_full.notes: BLOCKED - invest-toggle-full button does not exist on page because dashboard never mounts.

TEST4_strip_values.notes: BLOCKED - strip-* cards do not exist.

TEST5_operate_hero.notes: BLOCKED by operate opener->hero transition bug. 0/11 of operate-perf-*, operate-opp-*, operate-action-*, operate-build-plan-cta found.

TEST6_spitogatos_paste.notes: PASS: URL paste navigates to /invest/asset/dft_*, listing-unreadable-screen visible, all 4 recovery paths present (unreadable-path-retry, unreadable-path-paste, unreadable-path-upload, unreadable-path-manual).

TEST7_brand.notes: PASS: title='PropOS - The Operating System for Hospitality Assets'. Nav shows 'PropOS.' as visible text. Footer contains PropOS. No VELA or STAYOS in user-visible text. (Note: internal testids still use legacy 'vela-nav', 'vela-footer' but user-visible content is clean.)

action_items: CRITICAL: Debug InvestOpener.onContinue / introStage transition. Verify setIntroStage(INTRO.DONE) re-renders InvestDashboard with analysis intact. Suspect: analysis becomes null on re-render, or onContinue is not wired to button. Check /app/frontend/src/pages/invest/InvestDashboard.jsx lines 293-300 and the InvestOpener component itself.
CRITICAL: Same fix needed for OperateOpener -> Operate hero transition.
Rename Hero.jsx line 129 data-testid from `landing-proof-${p.id}` to `landing-proof-card-${p.id}` to match spec, OR update test spec to use 'landing-proof-' prefix. Currently a naming mismatch only.
Internal testids 'vela-nav' and 'vela-footer' still use legacy 'vela-' prefix. Not user-visible so low priority, but consider renaming to 'propos-nav'/'propos-footer' for consistency.
critical_code_review_comments: InvestDashboard.jsx is 622 lines - exceeds 700-line threshold soon; consider modularizing (already partially done via dashboard/* components).

Cinematic intro flow (THINKING -> OPENER -> DONE) is brittle: if analysis fails to load or becomes null between stages, the user gets stuck with no fallback UI. Add error boundary or 'Skip intro' escape hatch.

Backend 401 errors visible in console on every page load (`Failed to load resource: 401`). Not affecting the tested flows but indicates an unauth'd request from frontend that should be handled or removed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use preview URL https://hospitality-ai-12.preview.emergentagent.com. The intro flow for /invest/asset/demo is: InvestThinking (~30s, 7 phases) -> InvestOpener (button 'OPEN INVESTOR TERMINAL' has testid invest-opener-continue-btn) -> InvestDashboard (decision strip + minimal view). Currently the second transition is broken - clicking invest-opener-continue-btn keeps the opener mounted. Same pattern on /operate after clicking operate-demo-btn -> Continue Analysis -> operate-opener-continue-btn. TEST6 (Spitogatos) and TEST7 (Brand) both pass cleanly. TEST1 fails only due to testid naming - the 3 proof cards & titles are correct.
rca_of_the_issue: Root cause for TEST2-5 failures: InvestOpener (and OperateOpener) onContinue prop does not result in the parent re-rendering the dashboard. Either (a) the click handler is not wired to the button at testid invest-opener-continue-btn, (b) onContinue=() => setIntroStage(INTRO.DONE) is called but state update is overridden by useEffect resetting introStage, or (c) analysis becomes null after re-render causing fallback to opener. Reproduction: navigate to /invest/asset/demo, wait for 'OPEN INVESTOR TERMINAL' button, click it, wait 5s - dashboard never mounts. Mitigation: Inspect InvestOpener.jsx button's onClick wiring; verify setIntroStage(INTRO.DONE) is the only thing the handler does and that no useEffect resets it; ensure analysis state remains populated across the stage change.
